title: [MTR4] London Underground 1938 stock
description: Resource pack that adds the London Underground 1938 stock into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
_A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway._

# Overview
The London Underground 1938 stock is a type of London Underground rolling stock designed for Deep Level Tube lines. A total of 1121 cars were produced by Metro-Cammell and Birmingham Railway Carriage & Wagon Company. By the end of 1953, another 173 cars were produced, comprising 91 “1949 stock”, 76 conversions from Standard stocks or 1935 stock, and 6 unconverted cars of 1935 stock. These trains were in service from 1938 till they retired from service in 1988, and worked on Bakerloo, Central, East London, Northern, Northern City, and Piccadilly lines. 20 driving motor cars were converted to Class 483s, allowing them to run on the Island Line until they were all retired in 2021, making them the oldest passenger train to be in regular service by the time they retired, at 83 years old. The honour has since been passed on to the 1972 stock on the Bakerloo Line till the present day, as of January 2026.

This resource pack is to add the London Underground 1938 stock into Minecraft with the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by Navi_LX9702 in 2026.

# What will be in this pack?
London Underground 1938 stock
1. Grey roof

# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, London Transport and its successor, Transport for London, Island Line Trains, South Western Railway, and Great British Railway.
